full_text:
Luxi
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Luxiwas born in Taiyuan. A noted archer. Deserted his post when he feared separation from wife and was killed. Luxi was affiliated with Wuhuan and the Wei Kingdom. Luxi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
